title: rubia angustifolia var. requienii
intro: Rubia angustifolia var. requienii, also known as Requien's rubia or French root, is a variety of the Rubia plant species that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its high concentration of anthraquinones, which are responsible for its laxative and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Rubia angustifolia var. requienii include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as constipation, and its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Rubia angustifolia var. requienii is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried root powder, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
